name: jsql-injection
title: jsql-injection
summary: Java tool for automatic database injection
description:
Java tool for automatic database injection
jSQL Injection is a lightweight application used to find database information
from a distant server.
jSQL is free, open source and cross-platform (Windows, Linux, Mac OS X,
Solaris).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use jsql because Java tool for automatic database injection.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use jsql as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `jsql [options] [args]` as documented upstream for jsql.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair jsql with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `jsql --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
